hero.headline: Modern, Gentle Dentistry in Luxembourg.
hero.subheadline: Experience stress-free dental care. Call us today or request a callback to schedule your visit.

socialProof.text: Trusted by over 2,000 smiling patients in Luxembourg.

items.title: Pain-Free & Gentle
items.description: We use modern techniques to ensure your visit is completely comfortable.

items.title: Comprehensive Care
items.description: From routine cleanings to cosmetic procedures, all under one roof.

items.title: Easy Scheduling
items.description: Call our friendly reception team to find a time that works perfectly for you.

items.title: General Dentistry
items.description: Routine exams, cleanings, and preventive care to maintain your oral health.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Teeth whitening, veneers, and aesthetic treatments for a perfect smile.

items.title: Implants & Crowns
items.description: Durable, natural-looking restorations to replace missing or damaged teeth.

items.title: Emergency Care
items.description: Urgent appointments available for severe dental pain and emergencies.

items.quote: I used to dread the dentist, but the team here is incredibly gentle. Booking over the phone was quick and easy.
items.name: Marie T.

items.quote: Fast, professional, and painless. They explained everything clearly and got my smile looking perfect again.
items.name: Thomas L.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: Simply call us at +352 12 34 56 during our business hours, or fill out the 'Request Appointment' form and our reception team will call you back.

items.question: Do you accept CNS coverage?
items.answer: Yes, we work within the Luxembourg CNS framework and provide detailed invoices for your health insurance reimbursements.

items.question: Do you take emergency appointments?
items.answer: Yes, please call us immediately if you are experiencing severe pain or a dental emergency.

ctaBanner.headline: Ready for a healthier, brighter smile?

footer.tagline: Delivering exceptional dental care to the Luxembourg community.
footer.address: 12 Rue de la Sante, L-1234 Luxembourg

form.title: Request an Appointment
form.description: Fill out the form below and we will contact you within 3 business days.
form.success: Your request has been submitted. We will contact you by phone or email within 3 business days.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
